title: Salpingolobivia andalgalensis
taxonomy: Salpingolobivia andalgalensis is classified within the Cactaceae family, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as cacti. This species is further classified within the subfamily Cactoideae and the tribe Cacteae. It belongs to the genus Salpingolobivia, which is a small genus of cacti found in the Andes mountains. Salpingolobivia andalgalensis is native to Bolivia and is characterized by its compact growth habit and distinctive spines. The species is also known by its synonym, Lobivia andalgalensis.
